plugins.name: interaction-logger
plugins.description: Logs every Claude Code prompt and response to a local JSONL history file with timestamps and session IDs, so you can trace which input led to which output.

plugins.name: java-guidelines
plugins.description: Injects Java coding patterns, conventions, and best practices into the agent context whenever Java code is being written or reviewed.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Project management pipeline for large/complex work: PRD interview, multi-persona research, ordered task generation, stack-aware execution, and independent verification. Supports versioned milestones (v1, v2, ...).
